commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1a2ef343ae6b061010eff5dd6bbf104f1e5d304e)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds positional cron add/create parsing, `--webhook` support for cron add/create/edit, webhook delivery cleanup, cron schedule identity type widening, docs/tests, and formatting-only dependency-guard changes.

PR surface: Source +114, Tests +158, Docs +30, Other +12. Total +314 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: create a main `systemEvent` cron job with `--webhook` or edit an existing main job with `--webhook`, then run it; current main-session execution returns without any webhook delivery path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human maintainer/product review to choose main-session webhook semantics and to accept real behavior proof; this is not a narrow automated repair lane.

target.title: feat: improve cron create delivery ergonomics
target.body:
## Summary

- Add Hermes-style `openclaw cron create "0 2 * * *" "prompt" --name ...` parsing for cron expressions, `every <duration>` intervals, durations, and timestamps while preserving the existing flagged create path.
- Keep `--webhook <url>` delivery on `cron add/create` and `cron edit`, with conflicts against chat delivery flags.
- Clear stale chat delivery fields when an existing cron job switches to webhook delivery.
- Update cron CLI and scheduled-task docs with positional schedule/prompt examples and webhook examples.
- Widen cron schedule identity comparison types to accept persisted numeric schedule inputs that the normalizer already supports, while preserving cron stagger semantics.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/cron/schedule-identity.test.ts src/cli/cron-cli.test.ts src/cron/service.jobs.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm check:import-cycles`
- `pnpm check:changed` on Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksrrbyxs30gdd74wnm13g2cy` / run `26614011157`
- `pnpm check:docs`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: cron creation can use the Hermes-style schedule-first and prompt-second command shape, plus webhook delivery without hand-editing job JSON or relying on undocumented delivery fields.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout plus delegated Blacksmith Testbox changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/cron/schedule-identity.test.ts src/cli/cron-cli.test.ts src/cron/service.jobs.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`; `pnpm check:test-types`; `pnpm check:import-cycles`; `pnpm check:changed`; `pnpm check:docs`; `git diff --check`; autoreview local and branch diff.

Evidence after fix: cron CLI regression tests assert positional cron schedules, positional `every 1h` schedules, positional prompt conflicts, positional names, webhook add/create payloads, webhook edit payloads, and mixed webhook/chat delivery errors. Cron service regression tests assert switching to webhook delivery clears chat-only fields. Test type checking covers the persisted schedule identity type shape used by current CI merge refs.

Observed result after fix: all targeted tests and changed gates passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: live Gateway cron execution against an external webhook endpoint.
target.author: steipete
